name: Coquilles Saint-Jacques Au Four
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and drain 2 pounds of scallops. Arrange them in scallop shells or ramekins. If using sea scallops, cut each into 4 pieces.
2. Season the scallops with salt and pepper. Cover them with finely chopped mushrooms and parsley. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
3. Dot each shell with butter. Sprinkle with 1 teaspoon dry white wine.
4. Place the shells on a baking sheet and bake in a hot oven (400°F) for 10 to 12 minutes.
5. Squeeze a few drops of lemon juice over each shell. Garnish with parsley sprigs.
